# Resource: proxmox_notifications_endpoint_gotify

Manages a Gotify notification endpoint.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the Gotify endpoint.
- `server` (String) The Gotify server URL.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The Gotify API token. This value is write-only and will not be read back from the API.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Comment.
- `disable` (Boolean) Disable this endpoint. Defaults to `false`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of this resource.
